recommendations.title: The Spirit of Christmas
recommendations.overview: A woman falls in love with a man who is somewhat unavailable.

recommendations.title: Flying Colors
recommendations.overview: A high school girl, Sayaka Kudō was the bottom of the class. After a year, she improved her deviation value from 30 to 70, then passed Keio University that is considered one of the most difficult to enter in Japan.

recommendations.title: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dreaming Girl
recommendations.overview: In Fujisawa, Sakuta Azusagawa is in his second year of high school. Blissful days with his girlfriend and upperclassman, Mai Sakurajima, are interrupted by the appearance of his first crush, Shoko Makinohara.

recommendations.title: I Want to Eat Your Pancreas
recommendations.overview: After his classmate and crush is diagnosed with a pancreatic disease, an average high schooler sets out to make the most of her final days.

recommendations.title: Chemical Hearts
recommendations.overview: When a hopelessly romantic high school senior falls for a mysterious new classmate, it sets them both on an unexpected journey that teaches them about love, loss, and most importantly themselves.

recommendations.title: Badhaai Ho
recommendations.overview: A 25-year-old man tries to suppress his embarrassment when his mother announces that she is pregnant.

recommendations.title: To All the Boys: Always and Forever
recommendations.overview: Senior year of high school takes center stage as Lara Jean returns from a family trip to Korea and considers her college plans — with and without Peter.

recommendations.title: Don't Worry, I'm Fine
recommendations.overview: A 19-year-old searches for her twin brother after he runs away from home, following a fight with their father.

recommendations.title: Her Blue Sky
recommendations.overview: High school student Aoi Aioi lives with her elder sister, Akane, after a tragic accident took their parents away 13 years ago. Because Akane has since been taking care of her single-handedly, Aoi wants to move to Tokyo after her graduation to relieve

recommendations.title: School's Out
recommendations.overview: A few days before the baccalaureate, a high school student decides to settle accounts with the most cowardly teacher in the school.
